overall.description: Cinematic third-person gameplay footage from a video game (Red Dead Redemption 2) depicting a character in a cowboy hat and leather jacket walking through a stormy night in a Victorian-era town. The character traverses rain-soaked garden paths, residential streets lined with gas lamps, and open fields while heavy rain, fog, and occasional lightning create a moody, atmospheric scene.

scene_state.functional_zone: residential garden path with flower beds

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along a rain-soaked brick pathway between Victorian houses and garden beds

entered.detail: ornate black cast-iron gas lamp emitting warm yellow-orange light
two-story wooden house with white siding and covered porch
red and pink flowering plants along the garden path
wet brick walkway reflecting the gas lamp light

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow residential garden path at night, surrounded by flowering plants and Victorian architecture. Heavy rain falls steadily, creating reflections on the wet brick pathway illuminated by warm gas lamps.

events.description: passes through stone pillars and wrought iron gate from garden to street

agents.ego_description: walking through a gated entrance onto a residential street, turning slightly left

entered.detail: decorative black metal gate between stone pillars
tall stone gateposts supporting the iron fence
black ornate metal fencing running along the right side

segments.scene_description: The character transitions from the enclosed garden through a wrought iron gate onto a residential street. Stone pillars mark the entrance as the path changes from brick to dirt, with iron fencing now lining the right side.

events.description: horse-drawn carriage passes from right to left across the path
lightning flash illuminates the distant sky and clouds

agents.ego_description: walking along the fenced street as a carriage passes by in the rain

notable_agents.action: horse-drawn carriage with driver moving from right to left across the field of view

entered.detail: wooden carriage with two horses and a driver in dark clothing
simple wooden picket fence along the left side of the path

segments.scene_description: Walking along a dirt street lined with wrought iron fencing, the character encounters a horse-drawn carriage passing by. Heavy rain continues to fall as lightning briefly illuminates the stormy sky, revealing distant buildings ahead.

agents.ego_description: walking across open ground toward the distant lights of the town center

entered.detail: cluster of warm yellow lights from buildings in the distance
grassy open area with scattered trees on both sides

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a wide field as the character leaves the fenced street behind. Walking toward the distant glow of town lights, the surroundings become darker and more open, with only scattered trees visible in the stormy night.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from an enclosed, lamp-lit garden into the expansive darkness of a stormy open field. It begins on a narrow brick garden path surrounded by Victorian architecture and flowering plants, where warm gas lamps reflect off the rain-soaked ground. As the character moves forward, the scene shifts through a wrought iron gate and stone pillars, transitioning from the brick walkway onto a muddy residential street lined with iron fencing. The camera continues along this dirt road, passing a horse-drawn carriage as flashes of lightning briefly illuminate the stormy sky and distant buildings. Finally, the environment opens up as the character leaves the fenced street behind, moving into a wide, dark field with scattered trees toward the distant glow of town lights.
